attributes.title: [Couchbase] SRE Replication health
attributes.description: XDCR backlog, throttling, and Couchbase Lite replication posture (catch-up, conflicts, sync cost).

params.markdown:
## [Couchbase] SRE Replication health

Catch replication failures before data is lost or clients diverge:
- XDCR items pending, backoff, and out-of-memory errors
- Remote throughput (items sent, bytes)
- CBL pull catch-up and continuous replication counts
- Push conflicts and sync-function CPU time
- Active replication sessions (Sync Gateway database stats)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS xdcr_backlog = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS xdcr_backlog = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS avg_backoff = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.backoff)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS avg_backoff = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.backoff)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS oom_max = MAX(couchbase.xdcr.errors.out_of_memory)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS oom_max = MAX(couchbase.xdcr.errors.out_of_memory)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS caught_up = MAX(couchbase.cbl_replication.pull.num.caught_up)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS caught_up = MAX(couchbase.cbl_replication.pull.num.caught_up)

FROM metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS repl = MAX(couchbase.database_stats.replications.active)

FROM metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS repl = MAX(couchbase.database_stats.replications.active)

TS metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS conflicts = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.cbl_replication.push.conflict.write.count))

TS metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS conflicts = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.cbl_replication.push.conflict.write.count))

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS pending = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining), backoff = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.backoff) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS pending = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining), backoff = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.backoff) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS oom = MAX(couchbase.xdcr.errors.out_of_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS oom = MAX(couchbase.xdcr.errors.out_of_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS bytes = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.bytes.total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS bytes = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.bytes.total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS caught = MAX(couchbase.cbl_replication.pull.num.caught_up) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cbl_replication.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS caught = MAX(couchbase.cbl_replication.pull.num.caught_up) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cbl_replication.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS sync_fn_s = SUM(RATE(couchbase.cbl_replication.push.sync.function.time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cbl_replication.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS sync_fn_s = SUM(RATE(couchbase.cbl_replication.push.sync.function.time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cbl_replication.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS c = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.cbl_replication.push.conflict.write.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cbl_replication.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.cbl_replication-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cbl_replication"
| STATS c = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.cbl_replication.push.conflict.write.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cbl_replication.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.database_stats.replications.active)), total = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.database_stats.replications.total)) BY db = couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT active DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.database_stats.replications.active)), total = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.database_stats.replications.total)) BY db = couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT active DESC
| LIMIT 50
